steps.title: Recognize what the student needs to accomplish
steps.content: The student's goal is explicit: “compare some disadvantages of docked and dockless bike-share programs.” From the notes, each program type has a distinct disadvantage—docked programs require significant resources (space and money), while dockless programs can be disorganized.

steps.title: Identify which choice compares both disadvantages
steps.content: C directly compares these two drawbacks: it identifies docked programs as resource-intensive while simultaneously noting that dockless programs present organizational challenges. A contrasts a dockless disadvantage against a docked advantage rather than comparing disadvantages; B emphasizes dockless advantages instead of disadvantages; D mentions only an advantage and skips actual disadvantages. That matches choice C — C is correct.
